name: construction project managers handling 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction project managers processing 5–15 projects/month, inefficient document creation causes delays in project timelines. We automate document generation instead of manual document creation using word processors and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient document creation processes for proposals and contracts.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient document creation processes for proposals and contracts.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual document creation using word processors and spreadsheets

one_liner: For construction project managers processing 5–15 projects/month, inefficient document creation causes delays in project timelines. We automate document generation instead of manual document creation using word processors and spreadsheets.
